top_signals.title: Kaleb Cooper: Brits don’t care about the price of milk
top_signals.summary: Brits don’t care about the price of milk, Kaleb Cooper has said, as he urged shoppers to buy more locally-made produce. The Clarkson’s Farm star told City AM that farmers would be “very, very grateful” for price rises if passed on to producers amid a battle to stay profitable in the face of higher costs. [...]

top_signals.title: Europe’s refugee population stabilizes after decade of growth, study shows
top_signals.summary: The number of ​refugees and asylum seekers in the European Union and Britain stood at 9.59 million in 2025, little changed from ⁠9.58 million a year earlier.

top_signals.title: Hackers exploit info disclosure bug in Gravity SMTP WordPress plugin
top_signals.summary: Threat actors are exploiting an unauthenticated information disclosure vulnerability in the WordPress plugin Gravity SMTP, active on 100,000 sites. [...]
